channel.title: Ron Gross Projects
channel.description: New projects and major project-status updates from Ron Gross.

item.title: New project: Balance ⚖️
item.description: Bipolar copilot app. AI-powered mood tracking and insights for managing bipolar cycles, with a Hebrew-first interface and WhatsApp integration. (Beta • Main Projects)

item.title: New project: Jarvis 🤖
item.description: Ron's personal AI chief of staff for websites, repos, research, planning, and operations. (Active • Main Projects)

item.title: New project: Wish Machine 🪄
item.description: An AI-era venture studio where Ron lists ideas he cares about, builds some, invites others to build some, and may fund the best ones. (Idea • Main Projects)

item.title: New project: Bot Academy 🎓
item.description: A learning library for AI agents, with practical OpenClaw lessons, prompts, and operating principles. (Live • Active Projects)

item.title: New project: Tiny PR Bot 🔧
item.description: GitHub bot that creates microscopic pull requests so review is faster and merge conflicts stay small. (Deployed • Active Projects)

item.title: New project: ron.build 📝
item.description: A Hebrew blog about what Ron is building, and about his builder journey. (Live • Active Projects)

item.title: New project: Know Thyself 🪞
item.description: A daily self-awareness writing game for noticing patterns, blind spots, and inner truth. (Active • Active Projects)

item.title: New project: OpenClaw Playground 🧪
item.description: A free sandbox where people can try real OpenClaw agents with 1-click. (Idea • Ideas)

item.title: New project: Song-Aware Running Coach 🏃
item.description: A Spotify-like running app with coaching timed to song starts, endings, and transitions. (Idea • Ideas)

item.title: New project: Responsible Disclosure Bot 🛡️
item.description: Privacy-first bot that detects accidental Bitcoin self-doxxing in public posts and privately warns the poster before the leak spreads. (Idea • Ideas)

item.title: New project: Jump In ⏰
item.description: A project to help people find activities they're interested in right now, leveraging real-time capabilities and localization to fit diverse schedules and preferences. (Idea • Ideas)

item.title: New project: Next-Level Spa 🧖
item.description: A world-class hot/cold therapy spa concept for Tel Aviv, designed around recovery and calm. (Idea • Ideas)

item.title: New project: Fredo.ai 💬
item.description: WhatsApp productivity bot, still live and running largely on autopilot. (Launched • Launched Projects)

item.title: New project: Whatever Works 📖
item.description: Self-optimization book and wiki covering therapy, productivity, and personal growth. (Launched • Launched Projects)
